name: Lemon Danish Dandies
recipeIngredient: Zest from 1 large Lemon, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter, sugar, and salt together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the sieved eggs (or processed in a food processor to be finely crumbled), lemon zest, and vanilla; blend well.
3. Gradually add flour and mix thoroughly until a dough forms.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight or freeze for 3 hours.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. With floured hands, roll the dough into small balls about 1 inch in diameter.
7. Place the balls one inch apart on greased baking sheets.
8. Press a blanched almond into the center of each ball; they will become slightly oval-shaped as baked.
9. Heat the corn syrup in a small saucepan until it thins slightly, then brush warm syrup over the cookies.
10. Bake for 8–11 minutes or until lightly golden.
11. Allow to cool on wire racks before storing airtight at room temperature for up to 5 days; freeze for up to 3 months.
